problem: Daily diabetes management is complex and burdensome, requiring constant logging of blood glucose, medications, food, and activity, leading to poor adherence and glycemic control.
solution: User-friendly diabetes management app and ecosystem created by people with diabetes for people with diabetes. Integrates with Accu-Chek devices and CGMs for automatic logging, provides glucose insights, bolus calculator (Class IIb medical device), and pump control. Acquired by Roche in 2017, serving 7M+ registered accounts with 4.6-star user experience rating. Proven clinical efficacy in improving glycemic control.
